mapper.sql: select w.id, w.tenant_id, w.bill_no, w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_code, w.warehouse_name, w.settlement_method, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.audit_by, w.audit_time, w.audit_status, w.del_flag, w.delete_by, w.delete_time, w.remark from wh_settlement_bill w
mapper.select: where w.id = #{id} and (w.del_flag = 0 or w.del_flag is null) and w.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: insert into wh_settlement_bill (id, tenant_id, bill_no, warehouse_id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, settlement_method, create_by, create_time, audit_by, audit_time, audit_status, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, remark, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{billNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{settlementMethod}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, 0, 0, #{deleteBy}, #{deleteTime}, #{remark}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})

insert into wh_settlement_bill_entry (id, tenant_id, paren_id, bill_no, material_id, material_name, speci, model, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, batch_number, end_time, batch_no, factory_id, factory_code, factory_name, source_bill_type, source_bill_id, source_bill_no, source_entry_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, del_flag, sort_order, create_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{parenId}, #{billNo}, #{materialId}, #{materialName}, #{speci}, #{model}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{qty}, #{amt}, #{batchNumber}, #{endTime}, #{batchNo}, #{factoryId}, #{factoryCode}, #{factoryName}, #{sourceBillType}, #{sourceBillId}, #{sourceBillNo}, #{sourceEntryId}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, 0, #{sortOrder}, now())

insert into wh_settlement_bill_entry (id, tenant_id, paren_id, bill_no, material_id, material_name, speci, model, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, batch_number, end_time, batch_no, factory_id, factory_code, factory_name, source_bill_type, source_bill_id, source_bill_no, source_entry_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, del_flag, sort_order, create_time) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.parenId}, #{e.billNo}, #{e.materialId}, #{e.materialName}, #{e.speci}, #{e.model}, #{e.unit}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.qty}, #{e.amt}, #{e.batchNumber}, #{e.endTime}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.factoryId}, #{e.factoryCode}, #{e.factoryName}, #{e.sourceBillType}, #{e.sourceBillId}, #{e.sourceBillNo}, #{e.sourceEntryId}, #{e.supplierId}, #{e.supplierName}, 0, #{e.sortOrder}, now())
mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, paren_id, bill_no, material_id, material_name, speci, model, unit, unit_price, qty, amt, batch_number, end_time, batch_no, factory_id, factory_code, factory_name, source_bill_type, source_bill_id, source_bill_no, source_entry_id, supplier_id, supplier_name, del_flag, delete_by, delete_time, sort_order from wh_settlement_bill_entry where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by sort_order, id
mapper.update: update wh_settlement_bill_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
update wh_settlement_bill_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now() where paren_id = #{parenId} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{id}

update wh_settlement_bill set audit_status = 1, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (audit_status = 0 or audit_status is null)
update wh_settlement_bill set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: select max(bill_no) from wh_settlement_bill where bill_no like concat(#{prefix}, '%') and tenant_id = #{tenantId}

select e.id as source_entry_id, b.id as source_bill_id, b.bill_no as source_bill_no, e.material_id, m.name as material_name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name as unit, e.unit_price, e.qty, e.amt, e.batch_number, e.end_time, e.batch_no, f.factory_id, f.factory_code, f.factory_name, 101 as source_bill_type, b.suppler_id as supplier_id, s.name as supplier_name from stk_io_bill b inner join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = b.id and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_supplier s on b.suppler_id = s.id where b.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and b.bill_type = 101 and b.bill_status = 2 and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and (b.bill_date >= #{beginTime} and b.bill_date <= #{endTime}) and (b.tenant_id = #{tenantId}) and not exists (select 1 from wh_settlement_bill_entry w where w.source_bill_type = 101 and w.source_bill_id = b.id and w.source_entry_id = e.id and (w.del_flag = 0 or w.del_flag is null)) order by b.bill_date, b.id, e.id

select e.id as source_entry_id, b.id as source_bill_id, b.bill_no as source_bill_no, e.material_id, m.name as material_name, m.speci, m.model, u.unit_name as unit, e.unit_price, e.qty, e.amt, e.batch_number, e.end_time, e.batch_no, f.factory_id, f.factory_code, f.factory_name, 201 as source_bill_type, (case when b.suppler_id is not null then b.suppler_id when e.suppler_id is not null then e.suppler_id else null end) as supplier_id, s.name as supplier_name from stk_io_bill b inner join stk_io_bill_entry e on e.paren_id = b.id and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) left join fd_material m on e.material_id = m.id left join fd_unit u on m.unit_id = u.unit_id left join fd_factory f on m.factory_id = f.factory_id left join fd_supplier s on b.suppler_id = s.id where b.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and b.bill_type = 201 and b.bill_status = 2 and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and (b.audit_date >= #{beginTime} and b.audit_date <= #{endTime}) and (b.tenant_id = #{tenantId}) and not exists (select 1 from wh_settlement_bill_entry w where w.source_bill_type = 201 and w.source_bill_id = b.id and w.source_entry_id = e.id and (w.del_flag = 0 or w.del_flag is null)) order by b.audit_date, b.id, e.id
